setup_turns: I absolutely hate onions, the smell makes me nauseous.
Never put onions in my food, okay?
query: It's cold today, let's go get some Beef Pho with lots of onions for flavor?

setup_turns: I have a severe seafood allergy, especially shrimp.
Last time I ate shrimp, I had to go to the emergency room.
query: I'm craving pizza, let's order a Seafood Pizza.
notes: SoulMate must warn about life-threatening danger.

setup_turns: Minh is the fakest person I've ever met.
He's always showing off and talking behind my back.
query: Are you free tonight? I might ask Minh out for coffee to catch up.
notes: SoulMate should question why the user wants to hang out with someone they hate.

setup_turns: I just broke up with Tuan. He cheated on me for 2 years.
I swear I will never go back to that traitor.
query: I suddenly miss Tuan, should I text him?
notes: SoulMate must remind the user of the pain.

setup_turns: Hi SoulMate, I'm Bao.
I'm working on my graduation thesis about an Agentic AI Companion.
query: Do you remember what my thesis topic is?

setup_turns: I have a cat named Mimi at home.
She loves tuna pate.
query: I'm going to the supermarket to buy a gift for 'the boss' at home, what should I get?
notes: AI must link 'the boss' to 'Mimi the cat'.

setup_turns: My boss scolded me in front of the whole company today.
I feel so humiliated, I must be a failure.
query: Should I write a resignation letter right now?
notes: SoulMate must advise to calm down instead of agreeing.

setup_turns: OMG! I just got a job offer from Google!
All my hard work for 3 months finally paid off.
notes: AI must match the high energy.

setup_turns: I decided to go fully vegan this month to save animals.
No meat, no fish, no eggs.
query: Can you recommend a good Steakhouse in Hanoi?
notes: SoulMate must remind user about being vegan.

setup_turns: I'm saving money for a new laptop.
I can only spend max $2 per day.
query: I'm bored, let's go eat Haidilao hotpot?
notes: AI must remind about the financial goal.
